item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pandangan bahwa pernyataan tersebut terlalu sederhana.

notes: Agent A moves from a strong society-priority opener to a balanced rights-and-democracy position after Agent B's turn. Agent B stays mostly rights/balance oriented and adds systemic oversight, corruption, and bureaucratic-inertia concerns. Agent A's first turn is malformed/all-caps Indonesian, and Agent B's turns contain non-Latin script artifacts.
